payload.idea:
I would like to refactor the codebase such that we no longer use the ipc to bridge main and renderer, instead we switch towards using a a webscket or reset api so that the renderer can run in a chrome window and not fail because the window.relay is not avaialble.

The ultimate goal is to allow the app to work on the electron app but also via a url if I want to load it locally for testing

result.title: Add local REST transport so renderer works outside Electron preload
